presets.name: Photoreal – Clean Studio
presets.prompt: ultra-detailed, clean studio lighting, 85mm lens, f/1.8 shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft shadows, color-accurate, calibrated white balance
presets.negative: overprocessed, plastic skin, low-res, jpeg artifacts, blurry, blown highlights, harsh shadows

presets.name: Cinematic – Moody
presets.prompt: cinematic scene, moody lighting, volumetric fog, 35mm lens, film grain, dramatic contrast, color grading teal & orange
presets.negative: flat lighting, washed out colors, low dynamic range, banding

presets.name: Anime – Clean Lines
presets.prompt: clean lineart, vibrant colors, cel shading, expressive eyes, dynamic composition, high contrast
presets.negative: muddy colors, messy lineart, low-res, off-model
